title: Peppery Creamy Energizing Chinese Potato Stir-fry
description: This dish combines red potatoes with a peppery sauce and creamy elements for an energizing meal that's dairy-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup unsweetened almond milk or coconut milk

instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the diced potatoes and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Remove the potatoes from the pan and set aside. In the same pan, add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the shiitake mushrooms and black pepper to the pan, stirring occasionally. Cook for another 3-4 minutes until the mushrooms are slightly softened.
Return the potatoes to the pan with the mushrooms. Add the soy sauce and lemon juice over high heat, stirring well to combine all ingredients.
If using nutritional yeast or dairy-free milk, mix in now. Stir gently until everything is heated through and the sauce thickens a bit.
Serve hot as a main dish.
